headline: ServiceNow Stock May Be Setting Up a Hidden Options Opportunity
summary: Although ServiceNow has struggled badly over the past several months, NOW stock finally looks credible.

headline: ServiceNow Expands AI Platform As Shares Trade Below Analyst Valuations
summary: ServiceNow launched its Autonomous Workforce and EmployeeWorks AI offerings, expanding its AI driven workflow tools for enterprises and public sector clients. The company entered new partnerships, including work with Autonomize AI in healthcare and with NTT DOCOMO and StarHub on global connectivity for its platform. ServiceNow received high level recognition for its AI platform transformation, including leadership placement in The Forrester Wave. For investors tracking NYSE:NOW, the share...

headline: Prismforce Announces Agent-Based Talent Supply Chain Solution Built on the ServiceNow AI Platform
summary: Prismforce, an AI-powered Talent Supply Chain platform, today announced a new agent-based talent supply chain solution built on the ServiceNow AI Platform, enabling enterprises to execute skill-based workforce decisions by embedding domain-specific, fit-for-purpose agentic AI directly into ServiceNow workflows.

headline: KONVERSATIONAL AWARDED SERVICENOW CRM PARTNER OF THE YEAR FOR THE AMERICAS REGION
summary: Konversational, a global leading technology consultancy firm, has been named ServiceNow's 2026 CRM Partner of the Year (Americas), marking the company's first partner award in the region. The award highlights Konversational's work helping organizations unify customer interactions, automate case management and deliver proactive, personalized service experiences that drive measurable satisfaction and loyalty. headline: Microsoft adds higher-priced Office tier with Copilot as it tries to juice sales with AI

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
